zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Stansfeld於1380年出生在英國越可爾哈利法可時，他的父親Thomas Stansfield31歲，母親Barbara de Lascelles28歲。他於1410年與Mary le Fleming在英國越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1457年在英國越可爾史坦菲爾德享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Stansfeld于1380年出生在英国越可爾哈利法可时，他的父亲Thomas Stansfield31岁，母亲Barbara de Lascelles28岁。他于1410年与Mary le Fleming在英国越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1457年在英国越可爾史坦菲爾德享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stansfeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stansfield
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Stansfield (Yorkshire) and Stansfield in Rochdale (Lancashire). The placenames may derive from an Old English personal name Stān (genitive Stānes) + Old English feld ‘open country’. However, there is little evidence to support the suggestion that such a personal name may have existed, and the initial element may be Old English stānes, genitive of stān ‘stone, rock’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Stansfeld was born in 1380, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, his father, Thomas Stansfield, was 31 and his mother, Barbara de Lascelles, was 28. He married Mary le Fleming in 1410, in York, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1457, in Stansfield, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Stansfeld est né en 1380, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Stansfield, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Barbara de Lascelles, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mary le Fleming en 1410, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1457, à Stansfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

Er hat 1410 in York, Yorkshire, England Mary le Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1457 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Stansfield, Yorkshire, England.

ko.Halifax, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스 할이파스 스트 자메스
ko.lifeSummary: John de Stansfeld(이)가 1380년 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Stansfield(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Barbara de Lascelles(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1410년 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 Mary le Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1457년 영국 요르크실르 스탠스필드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Mary le Fleming em 1410, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1457, em Stansfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos.

ru.Halifax, Yorkshire, England: хэлифакс ст джемесь, хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Stansfeld родился в 1380 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Stansfield было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Barbara de Lascelles, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary le Fleming в 1410 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1457 г. в местности стансфиелд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.

Se casó con Mary le Fleming en 1410, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1457, en Stansfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años.
